prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, which assumes log-normally distributed returns. Historical daily adjusted closing prices for ZTS over the last 5 years were used to estimate the daily mean log return (drift) and the standard deviation of daily log returns (volatility). These parameters were then scaled for a 20-day period. The point estimate is the median of the projected log-normal distribution, and the confidence intervals are derived from its corresponding quantiles.
